{"version":"5.73","themeCollection":{"baseTheme":{"name":"CY26SU05","type":2,"version":{"visual":"2.9.0","report":"3.3.0","page":"2.3.1"}}},"activeSectionIndex":3,"modelExtensions":[{"name":"extension","entities":[{"name":"DimDate","extends":"DimDate","measures":[{"name":"Corr Trips vs PM25","dataType":3,"expression":"
VAR Combined =
    FILTER(
        ADDCOLUMNS(
            VALUES(DimDate[date_key]),
            "TripsVal", [Total Trips],
            "PM25Val", [Avg PM25]
        ),
        NOT ISBLANK([TripsVal]) && NOT ISBLANK([PM25Val])
    )
VAR AvgX = AVERAGEX(Combined, [TripsVal])
VAR AvgY = AVERAGEX(Combined, [PM25Val])
VAR Numerator =
    SUMX(Combined, ([TripsVal] - AvgX) * ([PM25Val] - AvgY))
VAR DenomX =
    SUMX(Combined, ([TripsVal] - AvgX) * ([TripsVal] - AvgX))
VAR DenomY =
    SUMX(Combined, ([PM25Val] - AvgY) * ([PM25Val] - AvgY))
RETURN DIVIDE(Numerator, SQRT(DenomX * DenomY))","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"","entity":"FactTaxiDaily","name":"Total Trips"},{"schema":"","entity":"FactTaxiDaily","name":"Avg PM25"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Corr Trips vs NO2","dataType":3,"expression":"
VAR Combined =
    FILTER(
        ADDCOLUMNS(
            VALUES(DimDate[date_key]),
            "TripsVal", [Total Trips],
            "NO2Val", [Avg NO2]
        ),
        NOT ISBLANK([TripsVal]) && NOT ISBLANK([NO2Val])
    )
VAR AvgX = AVERAGEX(Combined, [TripsVal])
VAR AvgY = AVERAGEX(Combined, [NO2Val])
VAR Numerator =
    SUMX(Combined, ([TripsVal] - AvgX) * ([NO2Val] - AvgY))
VAR DenomX =
    SUMX(Combined, ([TripsVal] - AvgX) * ([TripsVal] - AvgX))
VAR DenomY =
    SUMX(Combined, ([NO2Val] - AvgY) * ([NO2Val] - AvgY))
RETURN DIVIDE(Numerator, SQRT(DenomX * DenomY))","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"","entity":"FactTaxiDaily","name":"Total Trips"},{"schema":"","entity":"FactTaxiDaily","name":"Avg NO2"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}}]},{"name":"FactTaxiDaily","extends":"FactTaxiDaily","measures":[{"name":"Avg Fare EUR","dataType":3,"expression":"DIVIDE([Total Revenue EUR], [Total Trips])","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"","entity":"FactTaxiDaily","name":"Total Revenue EUR"},{"schema":"","entity":"FactTaxiDaily","name":"Total Trips"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Trips Index","dataType":3,"expression":"
VAR BaseYear =
    CALCULATE(
        [Avg Trips per Day],
        ALL(DimDate),
        DimDate[year] = 2024
    )
VAR CurrentYear = [Avg Trips per Day]
RETURN DIVIDE(CurrentYear, BaseYear) * 100","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"extension","entity":"FactTaxiDaily","name":"Avg Trips per Day"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"PM25 Index","dataType":3,"expression":"
VAR BaseYear =
    CALCULATE(
        [Avg PM25],
        ALL(DimDate),
        DimDate[year] = 2024
    )
VAR CurrentYear = [Avg PM25]
RETURN DIVIDE(CurrentYear, BaseYear) * 100","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"","entity":"FactTaxiDaily","name":"Avg PM25"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"NO2 Index","dataType":3,"expression":"
VAR BaseYear =
    CALCULATE(
        [Avg NO2],
        ALL(DimDate),
        DimDate[year] = 2024
    )
VAR CurrentYear = [Avg NO2]
RETURN DIVIDE(CurrentYear, BaseYear) * 100","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"","entity":"FactTaxiDaily","name":"Avg NO2"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"GDP Index","dataType":3,"expression":"
VAR BaseYear =
    CALCULATE(
        SUM(DimGDP[gdp_current_usd]),
        ALL(DimGDP),
        DimGDP[year] = 2024
    )
VAR CurrentYear = SUM(DimGDP[gdp_current_usd])
RETURN DIVIDE(CurrentYear, BaseYear) * 100","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Avg Trips per Day","dataType":3,"expression":"
DIVIDE(
    [Total Trips],
    DISTINCTCOUNT(FactTaxiDaily[date_key])
)","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"","entity":"FactTaxiDaily","name":"Total Trips"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}}]},{"name":"FactTaxiHourly","extends":"FactTaxiHourly","measures":[{"name":"Total Trips Hourly","dataType":3,"expression":"SUM(FactTaxiHourly[trip_count])","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Avg Fare Hourly","dataType":3,"expression":"
DIVIDE(
    SUM(FactTaxiHourly[total_revenue_usd]),
    SUM(FactTaxiHourly[trip_count])
)","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Day Name","dataType":3,"expression":"
SWITCH(
    SELECTEDVALUE(FactTaxiHourly[day_of_week]),
    1, "Sun", 2, "Mon", 3, "Tue", 4, "Wed",
    5, "Thu", 6, "Fri", 7, "Sat"
)","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Hour Label","dataType":3,"expression":"
FORMAT(SELECTEDVALUE(FactTaxiHourly[pickup_hour]), "00") & ":00"","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Peak Hour","dataType":3,"expression":"
VAR PeakRow = 
    TOPN(1,
        SUMMARIZE(FactTaxiHourly, FactTaxiHourly[pickup_hour], "trips", [Total Trips Hourly]),
        [trips], DESC
    )
RETURN
    FORMAT(MAXX(PeakRow, FactTaxiHourly[pickup_hour]), "00") & ":00"","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"extension","entity":"FactTaxiHourly","name":"Total Trips Hourly"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Busiest Weekday","dataType":3,"expression":"
VAR PeakRow = 
    TOPN(1,
        SUMMARIZE(FactTaxiHourly, FactTaxiHourly[day_of_week], "trips", [Total Trips Hourly]),
        [trips], DESC
    )
VAR DayNum = MAXX(PeakRow, FactTaxiHourly[day_of_week])
RETURN
    SWITCH(DayNum, 1,"Sun",2,"Mon",3,"Tue",4,"Wed",5,"Thu",6,"Fri",7,"Sat")","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"extension","entity":"FactTaxiHourly","name":"Total Trips Hourly"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}},{"name":"Avg Trips per Hour","dataType":3,"expression":"DIVIDE([Total Trips Hourly], DISTINCTCOUNT(FactTaxiHourly[date_key]) * 24)","errorMessage":null,"hidden":false,"references":{"unrecognizedReferences":false,"measures":[{"schema":"extension","entity":"FactTaxiHourly","name":"Total Trips Hourly"}]},"formulaOverride":null,"formatInformation":{"formatString":"G","format":"General","thousandSeparator":false,"currencyFormat":null,"dateTimeCustomFormat":null}}]}]}],"defaultDrillFilterOtherVisuals":true,"linguisticSchemaSyncVersion":0,"settings":{"useNewFilterPaneExperience":true,"allowChangeFilterTypes":true,"useStylableVisualContainerHeader":true,"queryLimitOption":6,"useEnhancedTooltips":true,"exportDataMode":1,"useDefaultAggregateDisplayName":true},"objects":{"section":[{"properties":{"verticalAlignment":{"expr":{"Literal":{"Value":"'Top'"}}}}}],"outspacePane":[{"properties":{"expanded":{"expr":{"Literal":{"Value":"true"}}}}}]}}
